MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-27-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ORDER FROM COURT OF APPEAL - GRANTING APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF FILING FEES AND COSTS AS TO FILING FEE ONLY (A134562 DIV 2)
CLERK'S CERTIFICATE RE DISMISSAL OF APPEAL
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-19-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 610

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT PROBOARDS INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. EACH CAUSE OF ACTION FAILS TO STATE A CLAIM BECAUSE AMONG OTHER REASONS, THE CDA IMMUNIZES DEFENDANT FOR LIABILITY ARISING OUT OF ITS DECISION TO REMOVE PLAINTIFF'S FORUM, DEFENDANT IS NOT A STATE ACTOR FOR PURPOSES OF THE FIRST AMENDMENT, THE COURT LACKS JURISDICTION OVER COPYRIGHT CLAIMS, PLAINTIFF CANNOT PLEAD ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY DEFENDANT INTERFERRED WITH, THERE IS NO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONTRACT OF ADHESION, PLAINTIFF IS NOT A MEMBER OF PROTECTED CLASS AND CANNOT PLEAD A CONSPIRACY TO DEPRIVE HIM OF HIS RIGHTS. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER, CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-18-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-30-2011 CONTINUED TO DEC-02-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT PROBOARDS INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS IS CONTINUED TO SEP-27-2011 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 FOR DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS INCLUDING PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEPARTMENT 301, NO LATER THAN 9/22/11. SEE LOCAL RULE 2.6 (B). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489

EACH CAUSE OF ACTION FAILS TO STATE A CLAIM BECAUSE AMONG OTHER REASONS, THE CDA IMMUNIZES DEFENDANT FOR LIABILITY ARISING OUT OF ITS DECISION TO REMOVE PLAINTIFF'S FORUM, DEFENDANT IS NOT A STATE ACTOR FOR PURPOSES OF THE FIRST AMENDMENT, THE COURT LACKS JURISDICTION OVER COPYRIGHT CLAIMS, PLAINTIFF CANNOT PLEAD ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY DEFENDANT INTERFERRED WITH, THERE IS NO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONTRACT OF ADHESION, PLAINTIFF IS NOT A MEMBER OF PROTECTED CLASS AND CANNOT PLEAD A CONSPIRACY TO DEPRIVE HIM OF HIS RIGHTS.
